title: archidendron clypearia subsp. subcoriaceum
intro: Archidendron clypearia subsp. subcoriaceum, also known as the 'Tall Alstonia', is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Archidendron clypearia subsp. subcoriaceum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations and wounds. In traditional medicine, it is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for consumption, and sometimes used topically as a paste or salve for wound care and skin problems.
